sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96597" key="sterni/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερνίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, only fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερκ-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <sense id="n96597.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the breast</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλευραί</foreign>, i.e. the <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0402.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">th and</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0402.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">th</tr_> ribs, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:182" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.182</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
